title: Artifactual
body:
![Artifactual 2 logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3e658bf947ee5b5413c6f6b19eb08f42d43cfb7.png)

Artifactual is a modpack aimed at providing an engaging and challenging journey to become the ultimate user of magic and technology. Learn new spells, find artifacts, and create new technology to dominate the overworld.

This pack also has a heavy emphasis on adventure. Find mysterious ruins, creepy caves, and all sorts structures containing powerful loot.

📋Modlist
---
All mods are owned and maintained by their creators. Please review the list below for more information on each.
